<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Weekly Bouquet Subscription](28-weekly-subscription.jpg)

The reason florists exist. A bouquet on your kitchen table every week, designed by us with whatever's beautiful at market that morning. Pause for holidays, switch sizes whenever, no commitment beyond the current quarter.

## What's in it

- Florist's choice each week
- Wrapped or vase-ready (your pick)
- Same-day delivery within the local area

## Care

Each bouquet ships with care notes specific to the week's flowers.
